$schema_note: Registry of executable scripts under bin/. AI agents and humans both read this to decide which script to invoke and whether confirmation is needed before running it. Update on every add/remove/rename.

scripts.name: ingest-canon.mjs
scripts.purpose: Populate canon/corpus/<slug>/ from canon/sources.ingest.yaml entries (HTML / HTML-multi / PDF-manual fetch).
consumed_by: canon-librarian agent (indirect — reads the corpus this populates)
canon-refresher agent (proposes new entries this script ingests)

scripts.name: ingest-owned-book.mjs
scripts.purpose: Promote a paywalled-book stub at canon/corpus/<slug>/ from a LOCAL plaintext file the operator legitimately obtained (OCR of owned ebook, publisher plain-text export). Refuses if source.txt exists, file is <10 KB, or is empty; soft-warns on suspicious source paths.

scripts.name: check-path-discipline.sh
scripts.purpose: Read-only verification of repo path discipline (CLAUDE.md L7-16). Three modes: --resolve checks every markdown link target exists under repo-root interpretation; --inbound lists inbound markdown references to a file (excludes .claude/); --style flags ../-chain, absolute, or ~/-prefixed link targets.
